intended_use: 3DXR is the AW application which is intended to perform the three-dimensional (3D) reconstruction computation of any images acquired with a 3D Acquisition mode of the X-ray interventional system for v
intended_use_full: 3DXR is the AW application which is intended to perform the three-dimensional (3D) reconstruction computation of any images acquired with a 3D Acquisition mode of the X-ray interventional system for visualization under Volume Viewer. The 3D Acquisition modes are intended for imaging vessels, bones and soft tissues as well as other internal body structures. The 3D reconstructed Volume assist the physician in diagnosis, surgical planning, Interventional procedures and treatment follow-up.
target_condition: Streak artifacts in CBCT images caused by pulsatile blood flow around contrast-enhanced vessels and metallic devices
ground_truth: Conventional CBCT reconstruction images (without CleaRecon DL) and reference phantom images without simulated streak artifacts
other_metrics: Mean Absolute Error (MAE) reduction; Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) increase; 98% of cases evaluated as clearer with CleaRecon DL compared to conventional CBCT images
